description_long: This object is a compact, modern CD player with a sleek, rectangular base and a semi-circular, arching back panel. The front features a digital display screen with red LED numbers and a small rectangular button, likely for power or eject functions. The top surface has a large, circular, textured dial, possibly for volume or track selection, and a recessed area for placing a CD, with a visible spindle in the center. The sides are smooth, with one side showing a large, round, ridged knob, likely for additional control. The color scheme is primarily dark brown and black, with a matte finish and subtle branding text on the front. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a sturdy, plastic exterior.
description: A compact, modern CD player with a digital display, large control dial, and a semi-circular back panel in dark brown and black matte plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, branding, main control dial, and the recessed CD tray area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arching back panel and the flat, featureless side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the semi-circular back panel and the recessed CD tray area from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a large, round, ridged control knob and the arching back panel.
